transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: Concrete examples survive, but sections, arguments, and instructions arrive in a scrambled sequence; abrupt topic reversals prevent cumulative meaning, and the text finishes by returning to what reads like its opening.
paraphrased_evidence.B: A sustained observational example develops into a clear argument and practical instruction, though repeated assertions, typographic shouting, escalating polemic, and a boilerplate recap weaken the latter half.

parsed.generic_mechanism: Coherent causal sequencing lets each paragraph reinterpret and advance the previous one; disrupted ordering converts individually intelligible material into fragments without narrative accumulation.
